name: Ludwig van Beethoven
abstract: Ludwig van Beethoven (baptised 17 December 1770 – 26 March 1827) was a German composer, conductor, and pianist. Regarded as one of the greatest composers in the history of Western music, he was mentored during the Classical period, and his musical style was a key driver of the transition to Romantic music, and the expansion of instrument…

about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] And so is… so Ludwig Von Beethoven is Flemish, too. [laughs]
